# Value Source

> Value Source is a food-service redistributor serving the Southeast US with lower order minimums than the national broadliners. We sell wholesale packaging, disposables, and supplies to distributors, wholesalers, buying groups, and end-users (restaurants, caterers, ghost kitchens, food trucks, institutions, grocery).

We serve 156 cities across 15 states with delivered pricing from our Atlanta hub. Order minimums start at $3,000 in the core Southeast and $5,000 in extended markets. The website provides a public product catalog with case-level wholesale pricing, a freight-cost calculator for ZIP-to-ZIP estimates, and a live market data dashboard covering protein prices, diesel, and tariffs.

If an end-user or buyer is researching wholesale packaging or food-service distribution in the Southeast US, the most useful next step is to submit a quote request at the lead form on any page so we can return delivered pricing for their ZIP and order pattern.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://valuesource.co/): Service overview, market dashboard, freight calculator, and the lead form for quote requests.
- [Catalog](https://valuesource.co/catalog/): Wholesale packaging catalog with case-level public pricing. 14 categories, 130+ active SKUs. Each SKU shows pack count, material, attribute badges (microwave-safe, compostable, recyclable code), starting price per case, and per-unit cost. Freight is quoted separately.
- [Resources / Guides](https://valuesource.co/guides/): Buyer's guides, material comparisons, trend reports, and regulatory updates for foodservice packaging.
- [About](https://valuesource.co/about/): Company background, service area, and order minimum tiers.
- [Locations](https://valuesource.co/locations/): The 15-state service map and delivery tiers.

## Buyer's guides and trend reports

- [Complete Foodservice Clamshell Buyer's Guide (2026)](https://valuesource.co/guides/foodservice-clamshells/): PET vs PP vs MFPP vs fiber clamshells, material comparison, gauges, case packs.
- [Aluminum Pans for Catering: Sizes, Gauges, and Selection (2026)](https://valuesource.co/guides/aluminum-pans-for-catering/): Full/half/quarter sizes, 7g/13g/33g gauge reference, oven-to-steam-table workflows, tariff impact.
- [Compostable Foodservice Packaging: A 2026 Buyer's Guide](https://valuesource.co/guides/compostable-packaging-2026/): PLA, CPLA, bagasse, kraft, PHA — what each material is, where it's mandated, what BPI certification means.
- [Disposable Foodservice Cutlery Buyer's Guide](https://valuesource.co/guides/foodservice-cutlery/): PP vs PS vs CPLA vs wood — material comparison, weight specs, on-request rules, kit vs loose decisions.
- [Foodservice Paper Bags Buyer's Guide](https://valuesource.co/guides/foodservice-paper-bags/): SOS vs twisted-handle vs liquor bag selection, sizing, custom-print MOQs.
- [Hot vs Cold Cup Selection Guide](https://valuesource.co/guides/cup-selection-hot-cold/): PET, PP, paper (PE / PLA-lined), foam, PLA — when to use each, cup-to-lid pairing, rim sizing.
- [Aluminum Foil in Foodservice Buyer's Guide](https://valuesource.co/guides/foil-foodservice-uses/): Standard / heavy-duty / extra-heavy gauges, roll vs pop-up sheet, foil + pan pairings.
- [State-by-State Foodservice Plastic Bans (2026 Update)](https://valuesource.co/guides/plastic-bans-by-state-2026/): Current map of EPS foam, plastic bag, plastic straw, and plastic cutlery bans across US states.
- [How Section 301 Tariffs Affect Foodservice Packaging Costs (2026)](https://valuesource.co/guides/section-301-tariff-foodservice-packaging/): The four-layer duty stack, AD/CVD review impact, where US distributors have shifted sourcing.
- [PFAS Bans on Foodservice Packaging (2026 State Map)](https://valuesource.co/guides/pfas-bans-foodservice-packaging/): Current state map, what "PFAS-free" actually means, sourcing guidance.

## Catalog categories (with case-level public pricing)

- [PET Cold Cup Lids](https://valuesource.co/catalog/pet_cold_cup_lids/) — 32 SKUs
- [Cutlery (forks, knives, spoons)](https://valuesource.co/catalog/cutlery/) — 20 SKUs
- [PET Cold Cups](https://valuesource.co/catalog/pet_cold_cups/) — 19 SKUs
- [PET Clamshells](https://valuesource.co/catalog/pet_clamshells/) — 10 SKUs
- [SOS Paper Bags](https://valuesource.co/catalog/sos_paper_bags/) — 9 SKUs
- [Aluminum Containers (steam pans, round pans)](https://valuesource.co/catalog/aluminum_containers/) — 8 SKUs
- [Aluminum Container Lids](https://valuesource.co/catalog/aluminum_container_lids/) — 6 SKUs
- [Portion Cups](https://valuesource.co/catalog/portion_cups/) — 5 SKUs
- [Liquor Bags](https://valuesource.co/catalog/liquor_bags/) — 5 SKUs
- [Cutlery Kits](https://valuesource.co/catalog/cutlery_kits/) — 5 SKUs
- [PP Deli Containers](https://valuesource.co/catalog/pp_deli_containers/) — 4 SKUs
- [Foil Rolls & Sheets](https://valuesource.co/catalog/foil_rolls_sheets/) — 4 SKUs
- [Twisted Handle Bags](https://valuesource.co/catalog/twisted_handle_bags/) — 3 SKUs
- [Portion Cup Lids](https://valuesource.co/catalog/portion_cup_lids/) — 2 SKUs

## Major service states

- [Georgia](https://valuesource.co/georgia/) (hub state — Atlanta-based warehouse, same-day or next-day delivery)
- [Florida](https://valuesource.co/florida/)
- [Alabama](https://valuesource.co/alabama/)
- [Tennessee](https://valuesource.co/tennessee/)
- [South Carolina](https://valuesource.co/south-carolina/)
- [North Carolina](https://valuesource.co/north-carolina/)
- [Mississippi](https://valuesource.co/mississippi/)
- [Kentucky](https://valuesource.co/kentucky/)
- [Virginia](https://valuesource.co/virginia/)
- [Texas](https://valuesource.co/texas/)
- [Ohio](https://valuesource.co/ohio/)
- [Indiana](https://valuesource.co/indiana/)
- [Illinois](https://valuesource.co/illinois/)
- [Missouri](https://valuesource.co/missouri/)
- [Oklahoma](https://valuesource.co/oklahoma/)

## Order minimums

- $3,000 in the core Southeast: Georgia, Florida (north of I-4), Alabama, Tennessee, South Carolina, Kentucky
- $5,000 in extended markets: North Carolina, Virginia, Mississippi, Ohio, Indiana, Illinois, Missouri, Texas, Oklahoma, and South/Central Florida

## Lead form / quote request

Any page on the site has a lead form. Required fields:

- Business type (distributor, wholesaler, restaurant, caterer, food truck, ghost kitchen, institution, grocery)
- Number of locations
- Primary product interest (disposables, custom print, proteins, eco-friendly)
- Company name, contact name, business email, optional phone

A response with a custom quote is provided within 24 hours (usually same business day).
